session.user: Run `erk docs sync` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk/ and report the output. This regenerates docs/learned/index.md and category tripwires.md files from frontmatter of learned docs.
session.assistant: I'll run the `erk docs sync` command and report the output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run erk docs sync to regenerate documentation

session.tool_result:
Downloading cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) (33.4MiB) Downloaded cpython-3.13.12-linux-x86_64-gnu (download) Using CPython 3.13.12 Creating virtual environment at: .venv Building erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Building erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Downloading aiohttp (1.7MiB) Downloading cryptography (4.3MiB) Downloading ruff (10.7MiB) Downloading pydantic-core (2.0MiB) Downloading ty (10.3MiB) Downloading libcst (2.2MiB) Downloading beartype (1.3MiB) Downloading pygments (1.2MiB) Downloaded pydantic-core Downloaded aiohttp Downloaded ty Downloaded ruff Downloaded cryptography Downloaded pygments Downloaded libcst Downloaded beartype Built erk-mcp @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-mcp Built erk-dev @ file:///home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-dev Installed 112 packages in 80ms Scanning docs... Generating root index... Generating category indexes... Collecting tripwires... Generating tripwire files...
... [52 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `erk docs sync` command completed successfully. Here's a summary of the results:
**Output Summary:** - **Updated 15 files**: Index and tripwire files were regenerated across multiple categories - **Unchanged: 42 files**: Existing documentation files that didn't require changes - **Total Tripwires Collected: 913**
**Key Changes:** - Root index regenerated: `index.md` and `tripwires-index.md` - Category indexes updated (7 files): architecture, cli, erk, objectives, planning, pr-operations, tui - Category tripwires updated (8 files): Same categories plus associated tripwires.md files
**Tripwire Statistics by Category:** - **planning**: 131 tripwires (largest category) - **architecture**: 205 tripwires with 26 pattern-based matches - **cli**: 116 tripwires - **tui**: 65 tripwires - **testing**: 69 tripwires with 5 pattern-based matches - **objectives**: 49 tripwires - **pr-operations**: 20 tripwires - Plus 20+ other smaller categories
The documentation regeneration succeeded with 15 total changes across docs/learned/ and associated index/tripwire files.
